name: skin-refined
title: Refined skin
description: Compact, calm starting skin with a complete Control UI token contract.
docs: Add these imports once to app/globals.css: @import "../components/control-ui/styles/skin-theme.css"; @import "../components/control-ui/styles/skin.css";

files.content: /* Refined needs no pack-specific structural CSS; installing this file clears the previous pack's structural layer. */
